movie.title: Nights of Cabiria
movie.tagline: The story of a betrayed but unquenchable little Roman street-walker.
movie.overview: Rome, 1957. A woman, Cabiria, is robbed and left to drown by her boyfriend, Giorgio. Rescued, she resumes her life and tries her best to find happiness in a cynical world. Even when she thinks her struggles are over and she has found happiness and contentment, things may not be what they seem.
